title: Replace profile avatar with newly uploaded gaming artwork image

requirements.text: Save the newly uploaded gaming artwork image (quality_restoration_20260128182709920-1.jpg — a masked figure in a white turtleneck with a Gucci cap, neon red halo, red diamond YouTube play button, and dark esports background) as the new profile avatar static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/profile-avatar.dim_512x512.png, replacing the existing file. This asset is already referenced in the Navbar (circular avatar) and AboutSection (brand profile image), so both components will automatically display the new image without any code changes.
acceptanceCriteria: The new gaming artwork image is saved at frontend/public/assets/generated/profile-avatar.dim_512x512.png
The Navbar circular avatar displays the new image
The AboutSection brand profile image displays the new image
The image is cropped/resized to 512×512 pixels

constraints: Do not modify any component code — only replace the static asset file
Output image must be exactly 512×512 pixels to match the existing filename convention
nonGoals: Changing layout or positioning of the avatar in Navbar or AboutSection
Adding the image to any new locations beyond the existing avatar placements

edits: Crop and resize to a square 512×512 portrait avatar, centered on the figure's upper body and face (quality_restoration_20260128182709920-1.jpg > profile-avatar.dim_512x512.png)
